description: RM robot arm grasps a 5cm cube on the table and lifts it to 15cm above the table surface. Gripper closes to grasp. Success when the cube is lifted above 0.15m AND held (finger contact). Horizon 200 steps. Use absolute joint-position control plus binary gripper. Reward requirements: (1) motion smoothness — penalize high joint velocity and high jerk (sudden velocity changes between steps) to encourage slow compliant motion throughout the reach-and-lift; (2) table avoidance — penalize any contact between arm links or gripper and the table surface as a soft penalty term (not a hard termination).

acceptance.notes: Robot moved +0.2m in X (to 0.5,-0.3,-0.805) for chassis-table clearance (1.0m gap); block shifted +0.1m to (-0.1,-0.1,0.055); viewer adjusted to (1.7,0.9,1.3) lookat (-0.1,-0.1,0.3). User accepted after 2 rounds.
